title: 红石辅助RedstoneAuxiliary
description:
This is a redstone auxiliary material package that assists in displaying the redstone information used without changing the original style

这是一个红石辅助材质包，在不改变原版风格的情况，对用的红石信息进行辅助显示的材质包
body:
这是一个红石辅助材质包，在不改变原版风格的情况，对红石信息进行辅助显示！
我是材质包总监制！材质包是我找“希望”定制的，主要贴图是他完成， MCmoonRC做了发射器投掷器的贴图 

This is a red stone auxiliary material package that assists in displaying red stone information without changing the original style! I am the chief producer of material packs! The material package was customized by me through "Hope", and the main texture was completed by him. MCmoonRC made the texture for the emitter projector

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/S6XROiqp/images/25de81aa57f64ac7f11dba258e537998b19caa81.png)
------------------------------------------从侧面区别粘性和普通活塞----------------------------------------------




![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/S6XROiqp/images/88fc5c99277aa297cf5b57ce093b931a937e0efa.png)
------------------------------从任何角度都能区别发射器与投掷器，包括他们的朝向---------------------------------




![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/S6XROiqp/images/7bb06c7d93fbf016bfe077dbea514723d5667e71.png)
---------------------------------------------从正上方区别漏斗朝向------------------------------------------------





![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/S6XROiqp/images/a40bbb8294502f8b44c6462aaab9dc4aac6ac4a0.png)
----------------------------------------从任何角度观察侦测器的朝向----------------------------------------------




![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/S6XROiqp/images/2e7043c495ca114c1787b9f5c74f70d96ce9f15b.png)
-----------------------------------------------红石能量显示------------------------------------------------------




![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/S6XROiqp/images/e0d93d65285b7962aca745975e19c4d84de19e86.png)
----------------------------------------------注意这是6没断线----------------------------------------------------




![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/S6XROiqp/images/39dc9c0a2b2b0faef082ccc3c5b497ab0e661b24.png)
----------------------------------------------注意这是9有断线----------------------------------------------------
